verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Job kiangah
“Job aw, nangmah in Vanglian Pasian nong dem hi. Tu-in khawl ding na hiam, ahih kei leh keima thugen nong dawng ding hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“ Topa aw, ka haipau kha hi. Hong bangci dawn' theih ding ka hi hiam? Tu-a kipanin ka pau nawn kei ding hi
Ka gen dinga kilawm zahval genkha ka hih manin, tu-a kipanin ka pau nawn het kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin huihpi sung panin Topa in Job tungah thu genkik a
“Kipasalsakin dingto in la, ka thudotnate hong dawng in
Kei a thutang loin hong seh a, nang thutang kisa-in kei hong mawhsak na hi hiam
Kei zahin nang hat na hi hiam? Kei' awging zahin nang-a' gingzo ding ahi hiam
Na ngap nak leh na minthan'na ding leh na kihihsak theihna dingin tu-in hong kipan in la, minthan'na leh minliatna ngah ta in
A kiphasak mite en in la, na hehna tawh amaute niamkhiat gawp in
Mi kiphasakte en in la, amaute niamkhiat gawp in. Migilote khempeuh a omna mun munah tuancil in
Amaute khempeuh lei sungah phumcip in la, misite' gamsungah amaute khihcip in
Tua bangin na hihzawh nak leh nang a hong phat masa penpa, nang a gualzopa na hihna thu a hong phawk masa penpa ka hi ding hi
“Tui-sakol ganhing golpi ngaihsun dih in. Amah leh nang a piangsakpa keimah ka hi hi. Amah in bawngtal bangin lopa bek mah ne a
ahi zongin ama pum sungah bangzah hatna om a, bangzahta-in a sazang khauh ahi hiam
Ama mei, taamtak sing bangin khauhin tal po veva a, a khe-a a sazangte hat pha mahmah hi
Ama guhte sumngo bangin khauh a, ama khete sikzawl bangin a khauh hi
“Ganhing khempeuh lak pan a lamdang pen hi a, amah a Piangsakpa bek mah in amah a zozo ahi hi
Gamsate omna mualtung panin ama an ding lopa kipuak hi
Amah lingkung nuai-ah lum a, nawng sunga pumpeeng lakah a bu hi
Lingkungte leh lui gei-a gialhek kungte in ama-a' ding nilim piangsak hi
Amah in gun tuikhangte kihta hetlo a, tuikhang in ama maitang a nawkgawp hangin nuamtakin omthei veve hi
Kua in ama mit tawsakin manzo ding ahi hiam? Kua in a nakpheh-ah khau vawhzo ding ahi hiam?
